The free premium registries below are pulled via the shadcn MCP / CLI: `npx shadcn add @magicui/<name>`, etc. Each registry-item.json carries its own cssVars — after adding, run the shadcn audit checklist and reconcile tokens into src/styles/tokens.css (the single source of truth). NOTE: Astro renders these React/TSX items as islands (`client:*`); add @astrojs/react if you import interactive ones.
